params.name: Cheat Code
params.source: Found on the [[Terminal]] after using Cheat Codes in [[Gene Simulation]] and reaching 700F
params.description: On the memo is a string of programming code. It's most likely a backdoor left by the coder. Judging from its messy coding, the awful format, and the swearing in the annotations, the coder is probably undereducated and rude.
